examples: This action reflects his true beliefs
I mulled over the events of the afternoon
philosophers have speculated on the question of God for thousands of years
The scientist must stop to observe and start to excogitate

meanings.definition: to throw or bend back (from a surface)
examples: Sound is reflected well in this auditorium

meanings.definition: be bright by reflecting or casting light
give evidence of a certain behavior
examples: His lack of interest in the project reflects badly on him

meanings.definition: give evidence of the quality of
examples: The mess in his dorm room reflects on the student

meanings.definition: (especially of incident sound or light) bent or sent back
